item.title: 2.5 Lbs Spaghetti Challenge
item.description: This mountain comes with chili, cheese, and fried jalapeños—would you take it on?

media:content.media:description: This mountain comes with chili, cheese, and fried jalapeños—would you take it on?

item.title: Can I Finish 7 LBs of BBQ in 45 Minutes?
item.description: A big BBQ challenge with a fun, fast-paced finish. Challenge accepted... but this one’s going to get messy fast.

media:content.media:title: Can I Finish 7 LBs of BBQ in 45 Minutes?
media:content.media:description: A big BBQ challenge with a fun, fast-paced finish. Challenge accepted... but this one’s going to get messy fast.

item.title: Undefeated Pizza & Shake Challenge
item.description: Bragging rights are on the line as this pizza and shake challenge tests whether the streak survives.

media:content.media:description: Bragging rights are on the line as this pizza and shake challenge tests whether the streak survives.

item.title: Can He Beat My Big Texan Record?
item.description: A massive steak challenge with the clock ticking and the pressure building fast.

media:content.media:description: A massive steak challenge with the clock ticking and the pressure building fast.

item.title: BBQ Burger Challenge in Under 5
item.description: A big burger with a tiny clock and zero room for error—would you try this one? Fun food challenge energy with BBQ flavor and a big plate.

media:content.media:description: A big burger with a tiny clock and zero room for error—would you try this one? Fun food challenge energy with BBQ flavor and a big plate.

item.title: 13-Lb Burrito Challenge Time
item.description: One giant burrito, one ticking clock, and a whole lot of bragging rights.
